productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Washed Light Blue Capris
description: Composition Washed light blue capris with a fold over detail at the hems, made of 98.5% cotton and 1.5% spandex, has a waistband with belt loops and button and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back, brand patch on the back at the waistband and a smaller pocket on the right thigh Comes with a silver metal beaded keyholder/chain at the waist Fit Slim Wash care Machine or hand wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations If you're a denim person, these jeggings from jealous 21 are perfect for you. Designed to contour the hips and fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on! It'll go perfectly with your t-shirts and dressy tops, style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” and waist 28"
